page_title: Kokoro yo Genshi ni Modore ~2012 Version~
text:
is a single by Yuko Miyamura. The single was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KICM-1343. It was released on 11 January 2012. https://vgmdb.net/album/31653 
It is the theme for the CR Evangelion 7 pachinko machine.

Tracklist

Staff

Track-01
Lyrics: Neko Oikawa
Composition: Hidetoshi Sato
Arrangement: Toshiyuki Ohmori
Vocal: Yuko Miyamura

Track-02
Lyrics:Neko Oikawa
Composition: Toshiyuki Ohmori
Arrangement: Toshiyuki Ohmori
Vocal: Yuko Miyamura
